summary: 2 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Yugly
film.announcement: Animation film sells wide ahead of Annecy World Premiere. nWave team discusses the quirky characters and European CG animation.

film.title: Toxic
film.announcement: Yash's action film set for August release during extended holiday window.

tv.title: Kevin
tv.announcement: Series cancelled. Aubrey Plaza announces cancellation and expresses hope the show will find a new owner.

tv.title: Totally Spies Season 8
tv.announcement: Banijay Kids & Family close Latin America distribution deals for Season 8.
